data.title: Verizon Faces Slower Growth, Declining Cash Flow in 2025, Analyst Downgrades Stock
data.description: KeyBanc analyst Brandon Nispel downgrades Verizon to Sector Weight, citing limited 2025 EBITDA growth (1.5%) and declining free cash flow. He flags Verizon's potential Frontier Communications acquisition as a risky capital allocation decision, further impacting future growth.

data.title: Las Vegas Sands Stock Seen As 'Overly Compelling' As Analysts Highlight Macau Recovery, Project Return To 'Pre-Pandemic Levels'
data.description: A recovery and future growth in Macau could make Las Vegas Sands a must own stock, analysts say after Q3 results.

data.title: Cannabis Flower Sales In Colombia And The Small Producer Protection Myth: Ex-Official Says Most Companies Qualify
data.description: Colombia's cannabis decree allows dry flower sales, but ex-official claims it won't just protect small producers—most companies may qualify.

data.title: Bitcoin To Hit $73K On Election Day And $80K If Trump Wins, Says Standard Chartered
data.description: Standard Chartered has predicted that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) will hit $73,000 by the time of the U.S. presidential election on Nov.

data.title: Visa Teams Up With USAID To Boost Digital Government Platforms In Sub-Saharan Africa And Beyond
data.description: Visa and USAID collaborate to enhance global access to secure and inclusive digital government systems, promoting economic development and financial inclusion.
